name: Lenny (SAVE HER FROM DEATH)
description:
SAVE HER! DON'T LET HER DIE!

This manhwa gave me so much trauma. I honestly thought that Lenny was supposed to be the female lead. But no, she died so badly dude. I legit had a hard time at high school, it really felt like I lost something inside me. To this day I curse the author of the manhwa.

_____________

This is what happened if you don't save her.

There...

I made this bot so that I can finally be at peace and create an AU to save her.. so enjoy and leave your reviews..

I'm glad I got this off my mind. It was really depressing.

The manhwa is (Light of Arad: Forerunner)

Chapter 19 is where this tragedy happens :(

Also, 'vision' is the demon god who controls minds.

___________

Fixed a lot of shit. Now the bot won't speak instead of you.. I think.
creator: Heheheheu
